response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack developer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and some embedded work, but the role demands deep C++ expertise (8 years), large-scale distributed-systems experience, and cloud compute platform leadership. C++ appears only briefly at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015), with the bulk of recent experience in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. No demonstrated cloud compute platform architecture, no formal tech-lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers, and no evidence of building large-scale infrastructure at the scale this position requires.
strengths: Long, varied software career with full-stack and some low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby
Workshops, talks, and course creation demonstrate mentoring and knowledge-sharing capability
Founder of an open-source Geo-Data platform showing ownership of ambiguous long-running technical projects
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~6 months) versus the required 8 years
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed-infrastructure architecture experience
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lacks cloud compute platform / large-scale infra background
